subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: Adam is the symbol of the childhood of the race of man. Childhood has not a great capacity, therefore when he put out his hand to take the apple, he had not the capacity to receive such great knowledge as the apple symbolizes.
subcodes.subjects: @differences between the Manifestations; station of distinction, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @stories; anecdotes, @symbolism
